attractions.name: Blue Ridge Parkway — Milepost 234
attractions.blurb: America's favorite drive runs right past our door — we're the heart of the Parkway at MP 234.

attractions.name: Doughton Park
attractions.blurb: 30 miles of trails, trout streams, and preserved mountain homesteads.

attractions.name: New River State Park
attractions.blurb: Paddle and fish one of the oldest rivers in the world.

attractions.name: Stone Mountain State Park
attractions.blurb: A 600-foot granite dome, 18 miles of trails, and 30 miles of trout waters.

attractions.name: Julian Price Memorial Park
attractions.blurb: Canoe Price Lake beneath Grandfather Mountain.

attractions.name: Moses Cone Memorial Park
attractions.blurb: 25 miles of carriage trails around the historic Flat Top Manor.

attractions.name: Mount Jefferson State Natural Area
attractions.blurb: Summit views over Jefferson, West Jefferson, and three states.

attractions.name: Grandfather Mountain
attractions.blurb: The mile-high swinging bridge and the High Country's most famous peak.

attractions.name: Appalachian Ski Mtn.
attractions.blurb: Family skiing, snowboarding, and outdoor ice skating near Blowing Rock.

attractions.name: Beech Mountain Resort
attractions.blurb: Ski and ride at 5,506 feet — the highest resort town in the East.

attractions.name: Sugar Mountain Resort
attractions.blurb: The High Country's biggest ski area, minutes from Banner Elk.

attractions.name: City of Galax, Virginia
attractions.blurb: Old-time music capital, 30 minutes north across the Virginia line.

attractions.name: Grayson County, Virginia
attractions.blurb: Mount Rogers, the Grayson Highlands ponies, and VA mountain land (Aimee is licensed in Virginia, too).

resources.name: Alleghany County Chamber of Commerce
resources.blurb: Sparta visitor info, business directory, and events — Aimee is a proud member.

resources.name: Blowing Rock Chamber of Commerce
resources.blurb: Village events, dining, and lodging — Aimee is a proud member.

resources.name: Boone Area Chamber of Commerce
resources.blurb: The hub for High Country business and relocation info.

resources.name: The Blue Ridge Parkway
resources.blurb: Trip planning, mileposts, and closures for America's favorite drive.

resources.name: High Country Host
resources.blurb: The official visitor guide for the NC High Country.

resources.blurb: River access points, camping, and paddle trail maps.
